mapper.select: SELECT fp.id AS faceProfileId, fp.person_id AS personId, p.display_name AS displayName, p.person_kind AS personKind, fp.image_url AS imageUrl, (fp.embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector) AS distance, (1 - (fp.embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector)) AS score FROM face_profiles fp JOIN persons p ON p.id = fp.person_id WHERE fp.embedding IS NOT NULL AND (fp.embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector) <= #{maxDistance} ORDER BY fp.embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector LIMIT 1

SELECT ps.id AS sessionId, ps.person_id AS personId, ps.track_key AS trackKey, (ps.enter_body_embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector) AS distance, (1 - (ps.enter_body_embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector)) AS score FROM presence_sessions ps WHERE ps.location_id = #{locationId} AND ps.status = 'open' AND ps.enter_body_embedding IS NOT NULL AND (ps.enter_body_embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector) <= #{maxDistance} ORDER BY ps.enter_body_embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO face_profiles (person_id, embedding, image_url, is_primary, created_at) VALUES (#{personId}, #{embedding}::vector, #{imageUrl}, TRUE, NOW())
INSERT INTO body_profiles (person_id, embedding, image_url, is_primary, created_at) VALUES (#{personId}, #{embedding}::vector, #{imageUrl}, TRUE, NOW())
